stories.title: Let's overreact to the NFL schedule release: Tough...
stories.summary: How could strength of schedule impact postseason hopes for the Bears, Bengals and Chiefs? Does the Dolphins' slate point to them landing the top draft pick?

stories.title: 2026 NFL schedule release: Tracking all 32 teams a...
stories.summary: Full schedules, bold predictions and analyses are here.

stories.title: Pats-Seahawks SB rematch to kick off '26 season
stories.summary: In a rematch of Super Bowl LX, the Seahawks will welcome the Patriots to Lumen Field for the 2026 NFL season opener, one of 272 games officially announced throughout the league Thursday night.

stories.title: Knights finish off Ducks in 6 to make West finals
stories.summary: Mitch Marner set the tone for the Golden Knights with a highlight-reel between-the-legs goal in the first period, and Vegas went on to beat the Ducks 5-1 to advance to the Western Conference finals.

stories.title: Scheffler among largest throng atop PGA since '69
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler carded a 67 and is tied with six other players -- the biggest logjam in 57 years after the first round of a major -- at the PGA Championship.
